x-enumeration-literals.name: Physical Payment Device
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tangible devices used for transactions:

Comment:
Examples:
Debit cards, Credit cards, Prepaid cards, Smart cards

x-enumeration-literals.name: Digital or Virtual Device
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Non-physical devices primarily used for digital access or payments

Comment:
Examples:
Virtual cards, Mobile wallets/Payment tokens

x-enumeration-literals.name: Access or Identification Device
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Used to verify identity or provide secure access

Comment:
Examples:
Security tokens, RFID card, SIM-based authenticaion devices

x-enumeration-literals.name: Replacement Device
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Devices issued to replace or supplement existing ones

Comment:
Examples:
Replacement cards or tokens, backup devices
